mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.tag, a.gmt_modified AS gmtModified, CASE WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(a.content) > 200 THEN CONCAT(LEFT(a.content, 200), '...') ELSE a.content END AS summary, a.image AS image, a.writer_id AS writerId, (SELECT name FROM blog.user WHERE id = a.writer_id) AS writerName, a.gmt_create AS gmtCreate FROM blog.article a
AND ( a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND JSON_CONTAINS(a.tag, JSON_QUOTE(#{tag}))
ORDER BY a.gmt_modified DESC
